sql_array: CREATE TABLE files (id UInt32, virtual_columns LowCardinality(String)) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
SELECT id, virtual_columns._size, virtual_columns._time FROM files WHERE virtual_columns._time IS NOT NULL;
UPDATE files SET virtual_columns = '_path:/data/newfile.txt' WHERE id = 1;
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM files WHERE virtual_columns._size > 100000;
